asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates the startup diligence workflow in NodeRoom, showcasing spreadsheet enrichment, public/private agent lanes, and approval-gated handoffs with clear UI steps.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly shows the transition from spreadsheet data to research enrichment and agent-led analysis.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full flow from initiating enrichment to viewing completed rows and triggering downstream drafts.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-mode UI is clean and well-structured, though dense with information.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with NodeRoom's core concepts of sheets, notes, agents, and execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows authentic, real-time UI interactions and state changes rather than mockups.

legibility.evidence: Most UI elements and captions are readable, though some trace logs are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and startup diligence teams managing multi-agent workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Honest representation of AI capabilities, explicitly showing draft-only handoffs requiring human approval.

observedEvidence: Public and private agent lanes in Copilot
missingEvidence: Direct verification of the generated drafts in external platforms like Gmail or Slack.

defects.observed: The trace log text is small and updates rapidly, making it difficult to read in detail.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size of the trace log panel or extend the pause on key state changes.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run end-to-end startup diligence in NodeRoom: enrich watchlists, collaborate with public or private agents, and generate approval-gated drafts for downstream tools.
